title: Skillshare Metadata Store
description: Centralized metadata store for skillshare — tracks installed skills and agents. Location: ~/.config/skillshare/skills/.metadata.json (global) or .skillshare/skills/.metadata.json (project). Auto-managed; manual edits are preserved on reconciliation.

entries.description: Map of skill/agent relative paths to their metadata entries.

metadataEntry.description: Metadata for an installed skill or agent.

source.description: Original source input (GitHub path, local path, etc.).

kind.description: Resource kind. Empty or omitted defaults to 'skill'.

type.description: Source type (github, local, git-https, git-ssh, etc.).

tracked.description: True if installed with --track (preserves git history).

group.description: Subdirectory group the resource belongs to (set by --into).

branch.description: Git branch to clone from. Omit for remote default branch.

installed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the resource was installed.

repo_url.description: Git clone URL for the source repository.

subdir.description: Subdirectory within the repo (for monorepo installs).

version.description: Git commit hash at install/update time.

tree_hash.description: Git tree SHA of the subdir at install time.

file_hashes.description: Map of relative file paths to sha256:<hex> digests for integrity verification.
